name: Andrew Hyung
title: General Partner
bio: Andrew leads cleantech investments. He started his career in investment banking and has held multiple advisory / investor roles in the Bay Area venture community, especially in the cleantech sector. He is based in San Francisco and covers investments in North America and Singapore.

name: Gary Wunderlich
title: Investment Committee
bio: Gary is a co-founder of Live Oak Group and was a founder of Wunderlich Securities, a full-service investment firm, that was acquired in 2017. He serves on the board of Navitas Semi, a Nasdaq-listed company focused on energy efficiency.

name: Edwin Khoo
title: Special Advisor
bio: Edwin is a veteran banking executive with over 40 years of experience in consumer finance and SME banking across Asia. He was most recently a Senior Advisor at DBS Bank, where he sat on the Group Management Committee and previously led the Enterprise Banking division. Earlier, he spent 27 years at Citigroup, building its global auto-finance business into the bank’s largest secured-asset portfolio.

name: Gene Cho, Ph.D
title: General Partner
bio: Gene spearheads techbio investments, leveraging his background as a researcher and former life sciences consultant at LEK. With expertise spanning from drug discovery to commercialization, he most recently led global corporate strategy, and managed U.S. clinical trials and operations for a publicly-listed biotech company. Gene is based in San Francisco and frequently travels to New York, Seoul, and Singapore.

name: Rick Hendrix
title: Investment Committee
bio: Rick is a co-founder of Live Oak Group and was the Chairman & CEO of FBR & Co. He has had leadership positions at various financial firms, where he raised $10B+ for founder-led and sponsor-backed companies. He serves on the board of Navitas Semi, a Nasdaq-listed company focused on energy efficiency, and Danimer Scientific, a NYSE-listed sustainable advanced materials company.

name: Noel Kullavanijaya
title: Special Advisor
bio: Noel is a seasoned investor and capital markets professional. He was recently a Principal at Equilibrium Capital and the CEO of its broker-dealer subsidiary, where he led capital markets advisory and fundraising efforts. A former investment banker with over 20 years at Goldman Sachs, Merrill Lynch, and Citigroup, he has advised governments and financial institutions globally. He serves on Northwestern University’s McCormick School of Engineering Dean’s Advisory Council.

name: Lance Park
title: General Partner
bio:
Lance leads investments in Korea. He began his career in investment banking and has been active in the Korean VC community in both cleantech and biotech. 
He was the CEO at Clairvoyant Ventures (a venture fund with a focus in seed / early-stage Korea-based startups), and was also the CIO at CTK (a healthcare-focused venture fund).

name: Wee-Meng Thoo
title: Investment Committee
bio: Wee-Meng was a CIO of a single family office, where he led PE / VC investments in deep-tech and cleantech companies. He is a visionary who has advocated for sustainable development, climate change, and social impact in order to meet regulatory compliance. He has over 20 years of operational leadership experience at global technology firms such as HP, Sun Microsystems / Oracle, among others.

name: Shen Lee
title: Special Advisor
bio: Shen is a capital markets and fintech specialist with over three decades of experience in corporate restructuring, IPO/RTO advisory, and post-merger integration across Asia, Europe, and the U.S. He serves on multiple boards and was conferred the title of Senior Accredited Director by the Singapore Institute of Directors in 2024, having completed the SGX-backed Listed Entity Director program.
